title: The two advisory surfaces: survival warning and the anchor nudge
action: Per D4/D5/D9/D10/D11/D20. bee-session-close.mjs on PreCompact: append the precompact record, render the D9 survival warning when cell_compact_count >= 2, and emit the anchor nudge with force:true bypassing dedup — matching maybeCaptureQueueNudge's force at :412-414. All three go through emitHookOutput as a systemMessage and NEVER through encodeBlock: the B2/R14 contract at :234-238 forbids a turn-control verdict on compaction, so a blocking design is unimplementable, not merely unwanted. bee-prompt-context.mjs: emit the deduped anchor nudge via the existing shouldInject/markInjected, key 'anchor-missing-nudge', hash <sessionId>:<feature>:<cell>. Both hooks stay thin callers of compaction.mjs (D3). Author scripts/test_compaction_advisories.mjs: PreCompact output contains no decision:'block' under any input; the warning appears on the second compaction of a cell and not the first; the nudge fires on PreCompact even when the dedup cache was just marked; the nudge is suppressed on a second UserPromptSubmit within the interval; and no nudge at all when an anchor exists or the phase is terminal. Mirror both hooks and re-run the self-onboard (D20). RED-FAILURE EVIDENCE IS REQUIRED AT CAP: record the suite failing against the un-wired hooks before wiring them.

truths: PreCompact output carries no turn-control verdict of any kind, asserted directly against the emitted payload.
The survival warning fires on a cell's second compaction and not its first.
The PreCompact nudge survives a freshly-marked dedup cache; the UserPromptSubmit nudge does not.
The recorded red output against the un-wired hooks is attached as cap evidence.
artifacts: Both wired hooks, their mirrors, scripts/test_compaction_advisories.mjs
prohibitions: Never let the 30-minute dedup swallow the PreCompact nudge.
Never put the counting or predicate logic in a hook — it lives in compaction.mjs.

verify: node scripts/test_compaction_advisories.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check

trace.dropped_reason: Revision 2 failed validation (6 CRITICAL). Superseded by revision 3 under D23-D26: widened regen trigger, PreCompact row split, four-way count vocabulary, corrected handoffOutcome premise.
